text: This paper presents a novel approach to optimizing deep learning models for mobile devices. It reduces latency by 30% without sacrificing accuracy.
Deep learning has become ubiquitous. However mobile phones struggle with large neural networks.
Our method uses quantization. We convert 32-bit floats to 8-bit integers which shrinks the model size significantly but degrades performance if not calibrated.
The proposed method achieved 95% accuracy on ImageNet. Previous methods only got 92% latency was 15ms.
In conclusion our approach is great. Future work will explore 4-bit.
